title: The Draupnir
description: A highly detailed, mythical spear mod bringing epic remote explosive detonations and satisfying combat mechanics to your world.
body:
# 🔱 The Draupnir Spear
**A Mythical Weapon Mod by SaifMods**

The **Ultimate Vanilla-Friendly Combat Expansion**. 

Unleash the power of the gods with a legendary throwing spear featuring remote explosive detonations, custom fluid animations, and unique blood magic enchantments. Perfect for players who want a balanced yet devastating new combat style.

## ✨ Main Features
*   **Throw & Detonate:** Hurl up to 10 spears into enemies or blocks. **Press 'R'** (customizable keybind) to detonate them all simultaneously for massive explosive damage!
*   **Mega Charge Detonation:** Need more firepower? **Hold 'R'** to trigger a devastating **Bigger Explosion**, obliterating anything in its path.
*   **Cancel Throw:** Changed your mind? Press **Shift (Sneak)** to peacefully cancel a throw while charging.
*   **Balanced Enchanting:** Designed to fit into vanilla gameplay without breaking balance. The spear only accepts **Mending**, **Unbreaking**, and its **2 Custom Exclusive Enchantments**. (It purposely cannot take Sharpness or Loyalty).

## 🏹 Exclusive Custom Enchantments

🎯 True Flight (Level I - III)
Defy the laws of physics! Your spear transforms into an unstoppable projectile, shooting in an absolute straight laser line and completely ignoring gravity's drop-off. At Level III, it flies perfectly true for up to a staggering 300 blocks!

🦇 Vampiric Swarm (Level I - III)
A mythical blood-magic enchantment that turns the tide of battle. Upon detonation, there is a 15% chance to tear a rift and summon a swarm of immortal Vampiric Bats to your aid.

🛡️ Personal Bodyguards: These bats are fiercely loyal and will automatically swarm and attack any mob that dares to damage you.
⚔️ Command the Swarm: Mark your target! Hit any mob with a melee attack or your spear to instantly order your entire swarm to shred them.
🩸 Lifesteal: Every single bat bite has an 8% chance to siphon life force, healing you for up to 2.5 Hearts per bite at Level III.
⚡ Draupnir's Blessing (Mythical)
An ancient, godly blessing. Finding this tome is a monumental task, but its power is unmatched.

⏳ Hyper Charge: Cuts your throw charge time squarely in half, allowing for blistering fast attacks.
💥 Devastating Power: Grants a 2x damage multiplier to both your direct melee stabs and explosive remote detonations.
🩸 Vampiric Synergy: Dramatically supercharges the Vampiric Swarm enchantment if both are equipped. The bat spawn chance skyrockets to 50%, twice as many bats are summoned, their active duration is doubled to 60 seconds, and your lifesteal healing chance is doubled to 16%!

## 🗺️ Where to find the loot?
This legendary weapon cannot be crafted. Its secrets are hidden deep within the dark corners of **Ancient City** chests:
*   **The Draupnir Spear:** 5% Chance
*   **True Flight Book:** 10% Chance
*   **Vampiric Swarm Book:** 2% Chance (Even rarer than the spear!)
*   **Draupnir'S Blessing Book:** 0.1% Chance (Best of luck)

## 📥 Installation
1. Install Fabric Loader for Minecraft 26.1
2. Drop the `.jar` file into your `mods` folder.

## 🎨 Credits
> **IMPORTANT - 3D Spear Model Copyright:**
> The original 3D model for the Draupnir Spear was created by **[XHero](https://sketchfab.com/xhero)**. Massive thanks for the incredible voxel model!

*(Note: All Rights Reserved. Please do not re-upload or steal assets from this mod without permission from SaifMods).*
